violations.description: Food source requirements. — --Cooling ice was used as a food. -Glass bottle of ginger beer stored directly in drink ice.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Bar Sani bucket found at 50ppm chlorine.--Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Kitchen sani bucket found cloudy and between 50-100ppm chlorine.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Bar drink caddie/ice scoop holder has water and an olive at the bottom. -Small prep table has water and food debris in bottom of unit. -Residue at handles of make tables. -Residue/debris at microwave handles and interior. -Some dust/residue at upper interior fans of dessert/condiment cooler.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Bar sink found at approsimately 25ppm chlorine solution. *Ensure sanitizer sink is maintained at 50ppm Chlorine solution.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Sleeve of trays on floor in storage below stairs. -Case of toilet paper and case of paper towels.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use trays next to microwaves and near prep room slicer were not stored inverted.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Wall behind flat top is pitted/worn paint. -Floor at indoor walk in cooler has worn paint/wood and is starting to feel "soft".

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dish pit area has musty odor. *Just recently set up, may be from drains. -Water at floor of indoor walk in cooler. -Spilled sugar and other floor debris at dry storage below exterior stair well. -Ice build up at floor of out door walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Microwaves were not cleaned as frequently as required.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil Serving plates were not covered or inverted during storage.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
